reviews.review_description: The playernodel is skidded from monkaroon and the game is just bad

developer_response.body:
Hey! We appreciate your feedback, but this isn't true.
While we evaluate your review on this game not being the best experience, the playermodel is not stolen from another game.


This playermodel that we used is not stolen from anyone, as it was a purchased one from somebody that we didn't know was stolen.

Yet we appreciate your feedback, we highly advise this isn't the truth whatsoever.

reviews.review_description: Hi so i speak with the owner  and he say its not real drama and that it was an acident and he never meant anything okay this game is good he fix it soon
This game is super cool and also not copied from monkaroon.

developer_response.body:
thanks for the feedback! i appreciate your feedback, and your understanding.

we love you guys, and hope you continue to support us!
